description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a sprawling, irregular footprint and a dark, multi-faceted hip roof. The structure is surrounded by a paved driveway and walkways, with a prominent front entrance and a covered porch area. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a light-colored material, possibly stucco or painted siding, with large windows distributed asymmetrically around the building. The property is bordered by well-maintained grass lawns and is situated at the intersection of two paved roads, suggesting a suburban or urban neighborhood setting. The roof extends over the porch, providing shelter and architectural interest, while the driveway leads to a garage or carport area. The overall design is practical and inviting, with a focus on accessibility and curb appeal.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, light exterior walls, and a covered porch, set on a corner lot with paved driveways and walkways.
description_view_0: The front and side of the bungalow are visible, showing the main entrance, covered porch, and driveway curving around the property.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rear and side of the bungalow, with the driveway leading to a possible garage or carport and more of the lawn visible.
description_view_2: The back of the bungalow is prominent, showing additional windows and the continuation of the hip roof, with the lawn and road bordering the property.
description_view_3: The front facade and main entrance are most visible, with the covered porch and walkway leading up from the street.
